speaker: MATT
raw_text: However, your new dwarven friend transformed into some sort of a lycanthrope werebear, taking a greatsword from Grog's stash in the bag of holding. You gave chase over one of the guardians and keepers of the stronghold, killed it, and in doing so alerted other members of the stronghold, killed them, and in doing so alerted other members of the stronghold, and Grog, creeping forward down this hallway, revealed a central chamber where betwixt two pools of what appear to be molten, glowing blood, and sitting upon a throne, the corpulent, grotesque, sweaty, slick pit fiend named Utugash sits there. The terrible toothy grin, who speaks telepathically into your mind. "So. What do you bring to me to pleasure?" And I need you all to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: It's in there somewhere.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'm sure it was somewhere in there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, she said her name!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I think you did. Okay, good. Little else, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I wrote it down.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I know. That means it happened!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go. That was awesome.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I also wrote down "chain devils know." I don't know what that note meant.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, what do they know?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You were tripping last session.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Because the chain devil potentially knew--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: About the Bastion of Flesh, is that what it was?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, there you go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It was just, chain devils know, period.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: Very broody.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Chain devils, period  no. N-O. Period. Just don't.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That, too.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Vax and Percival are back this way, I'm going to say that these guys represent you as bats. We'll say that Taryon is one, Keyleth is two, Tova is three, Vex is four, and Grog is five. All right. So, we'll use these for spine devils for now. Well actually they're pretty small, so we'll use these. So these are the spine devils right here, and you see a bone devil coming up in the distance. So I need everyone to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: NOELLE
preceding_turns.text: Are we passing any cells?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They're both going to fire tail spines at you. Their tail curves up behind and swings. And they fire these spines forward.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fly zig zag! Fly zig zag!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Serpentine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's three of them so one of them's going to be at Grog, one's going to be at Vax and one's going to be at Percy. Against Grog, that is a two plus four. These guys can't hit anything. Six. Just zooms past you. One towards Vax. That's cocked. Natural 20. (groaning)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And against you, Percy. That is a 19 plus two, so both of you guys get hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Even basic damage, both of your bat forms (boof) and you both fall about ten feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is it an attack roll or--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, they both hit-- spines hit you. You both take--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But if it's under my AC?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, it's a bat's AC.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You're a bat.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh we're a bat-- bat's AC.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Bat AC.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Bat's AC, which is 12.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Thanks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So that's six-- So you take five points of damage, Vax, to your main form, and Percival, you take four points of damage to your main form. Oh, plus one point of fire damage and two points of fire damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: My armor is set to fire, so do I take one anyway?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You still take one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Okay, yeah. Just the two of us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so the rest of you are bats. Both of you plummet, hit the ground, and the spine devils approach.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Attempt to acrobat roll, so that I'm up and rolling?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh boy. Here we go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh dear lord.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So now, we have Vax and--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We did pretty good, you guys. We got pretty far.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we did get pretty far.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We did a lot. We did well.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, you start flower girling your way.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I hold my Wall of Stone, since he has that, because I don't want to make it apparent.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Get this map out if we can? Okay, so you guys continue to the right. Thank you. And bring the last one in. You guys head down this hallway for about another hundred feet, hearing the shouts behind. You hear conversation, different languages happening. They're getting a little more distant. You're catching some ground here, and it's going well. Eventually you make your way--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Jesus, there's another whole fucking map?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The doors, always. This is Matt Mercer we're talking about.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm looking for fucking traps.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys make your way down to the end of this chamber, and you see three different doors that are all closed off, to the front, to the right, and the left.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Fanged smiles.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fanged smile.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you're making your investigation check, you hear what sounds like the writhing of chains and the pulling of heavy metal grinding. As you begin to look and inspect the doors real fast, you glance up, and the entire ceiling is a sea of rolling chains, all gathering, and then from the ceiling bursts down in the center of the chamber-- (yelling)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A chain golem slams into the center, its glowing red eyes from underneath. All right. As you guys have all scattered amongst these chambers you ran down, Vax just rushed up and began to inspect these here. What are you guys doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, is this it? Is this where we're supposed to be?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We've got to find out which room he's in.
